parameters.query:
insert into public.golfer_results (
  golfer_id,
  event_name,
  position_raw,
  position_num,
  to_par,
  status,
  earnings,
  score_raw,
  thru,
  updated_at
)
values (
  {{$json.golfer_id}},
  '{{$json.event_name}}',
  {{ $json.position_raw ? "'" + $json.position_raw.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.position_num ?? 'null' }},
  {{ $json.to_par ? "'" + $json.to_par.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.status ? "'" + $json.status.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.earnings ?? 0 }},
  {{ $json.score_raw ? "'" + $json.score_raw.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.thru ? "'" + $json.thru.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'null' }},
  {{ $json.updated_at ? "'" + $json.updated_at + "'" : 'now()' }}
)
on conflict (golfer_id, event_name)
do update set
  position_raw = excluded.position_raw,
  position_num = excluded.position_num,
  to_par = excluded.to_par,
  status = excluded.status,
  earnings = excluded.earnings,
  score_raw = excluded.score_raw,
  thru = excluded.thru,
  updated_at = excluded.updated_at;
